blocks.description: Program header (investment portfolio risk and return analysis framework v2.3, Quantitative Analytics Team — Investment Risk Division, analyst K. Nakamura, change log v1.0-v2.3 by K. Nakamura/R. Gupta/S. Park), Section 1 header; OPTIONS mprint mlogic symbolgen nocenter ls=200 ps=65 validvarname=v7 nofmterr msglevel=i compress=yes; LIBNAME for pos (/invest/positions readonly), mkt (/invest/market_data readonly), bench (/invest/benchmarks readonly), out (/invest/analytics/output); %LET for analysis_date=2026-02-19, analysis_dt via %SYSFUNC(INPUTN), risk_free_rate=0.0425, confidence_level=0.95, base_currency=USD, lookback_days=252, annualization=252, analyst_name=K. Nakamura, run_timestamp via %SYSFUNC(DATETIME), run_date via %SYSFUNC(TODAY); portfolio_list=PORT001 PORT002 PORT003, n_portfolios via %SYSFUNC(COUNTW), benchmark_id=BENCH_SP500; control flags analysis_rc=0, positions_loaded=0, returns_done=0, risk_done=0, attrib_done=0

%MACRO load_positions(portfolio_id=, as_of=) opening: Section 2 header (Macro Definitions); documentation header for loading portfolio holdings and computing weights with FX-adjusted values; %LOCAL n_positions total_mv as_of_dt; %LET as_of_dt via %SYSFUNC(INPUTN); %PUT banner with portfolio_id and as_of date

PROC SQL NOPRINT inside load_positions: Step 1 — CREATE TABLE work.positions_raw from pos.holdings p INNER JOIN mkt.prices m ON security_id and price_date=as_of_dt; SELECT portfolio_id, security_id, security_name, asset_class, sector, country, currency, quantity, cost_basis, close_price, quantity*close_price as market_value, cost_basis*quantity as total_cost, unrealized_return; WHERE portfolio_id and status='ACTIVE' and quantity>0; ORDER BY asset_class, sector, security_id; SELECT COUNT(*) INTO :n_positions TRIMMED; QUIT; %PUT loaded count
PROC SQL NOPRINT inside load_positions: Step 2 — SELECT SUM(market_value) INTO :total_mv TRIMMED from work.positions_raw for total portfolio market value; QUIT

DATA work.positions inside load_positions: SET work.positions_raw; computes portfolio_weight = market_value / total_mv; LENGTH position_size $10; classifies LARGE (>=5%), MEDIUM (>=2%), SMALL (<2%); FORMAT portfolio_weight percent8.4 market_value total_cost comma20.2; RUN

%IF &base_currency ^= USD_ONLY inside load_positions: Step 3 — multi-currency FX conversion; DATA work.positions SET work.positions; hash fx loaded from mkt.fx_rates with DEFINEKEY(currency_code, rate_date) DEFINEDATA(fx_rate); IF currency=base_currency THEN fx_rate=1.0 ELSE fx.find() with WARNING for missing rates; market_value_base=market_value*fx_rate, total_cost_base=total_cost*fx_rate; DROP rc rate_date currency_code; %END; %LET positions_loaded=1; %PUT success; %MEND load_positions

%MACRO calculate_returns(frequency=) opening: documentation header for computing returns at DAILY/MONTHLY/QUARTERLY frequency; outputs work.security_returns, work.portfolio_returns, work.return_stats, work.wealth_index; %LOCAL freq_label period_col n_periods; %PUT banner with frequency and lookback_days

%IF &frequency = DAILY inside calculate_returns: Step 1 — %LET freq_label=Daily, period_col=price_date; %ELSE %IF MONTHLY: freq_label=Monthly, period_col=month_end; %ELSE %IF QUARTERLY: freq_label=Quarterly, period_col=quarter_end; sets frequency-dependent parameters

PROC SORT inside calculate_returns: Step 2 — sorts mkt.prices OUT=work.price_sorted BY security_id price_date; WHERE price_date >= INTNX('day', analysis_dt, -lookback_days) AND price_date <= analysis_dt; RUN

DATA work.security_returns inside calculate_returns: Step 3 — SET work.price_sorted BY security_id price_date; prev_price=LAG(close_price), prev_id=LAG(security_id); IF first.security_id THEN daily_return=., log_return=.; ELSE IF same security AND prev_price>0 THEN daily_return=(close-prev)/prev, log_return=LOG(close/prev); LENGTH return_flag $15; flags EXTREME (>10%), HIGH (>5%), NORMAL; FORMAT percent10.4; DROP prev_price prev_id; RUN

PROC SQL NOPRINT inside calculate_returns: Step 4 — CREATE TABLE work.portfolio_returns; SELECT price_date, SUM(daily_return * portfolio_weight) as portfolio_return, SUM(log_return * portfolio_weight) as portfolio_log_return; FROM work.security_returns r INNER JOIN work.positions p ON security_id; WHERE daily_return IS NOT NULL; GROUP BY price_date ORDER BY price_date; SELECT COUNT(*) INTO :n_periods TRIMMED; QUIT; %PUT computed count with freq_label

PROC MEANS inside calculate_returns: Step 5 — DATA=work.portfolio_returns NOPRINT N MEAN STD MIN MAX MEDIAN Q1 Q3; VAR portfolio_return; OUTPUT OUT=work.return_stats(DROP=_TYPE_ _FREQ_) n=n_obs mean=mean_return std=std_return min=min_return max=max_return median=median_return q1=q1_return q3=q3_return; RUN

DATA work.wealth_index inside calculate_returns: Step 6 — SET work.portfolio_returns; RETAIN cumulative_wealth=1.0, cumulative_log=0.0, peak_wealth=1.0, max_drawdown=0.0; cumulative_wealth *= (1 + portfolio_return); cumulative_log += portfolio_log_return; tracks peak_wealth high-water mark; current_drawdown=(wealth-peak)/peak; updates max_drawdown; cumulative_return=wealth-1.0; FORMAT 10.6 and percent10.4; RUN; %LET returns_done=1; %PUT return calculation complete; %MEND calculate_returns

%MACRO risk_metrics(method=) opening: documentation header for VaR, CVaR, and risk decomposition via HISTORICAL, PARAMETRIC, or MONTECARLO methods; outputs work.var_results, work.risk_summary; %LOCAL var_estimate cvar_estimate n_simulations i; %PUT banner with method and confidence_level

%IF &method = HISTORICAL inside risk_metrics: Method 1 — PROC SORT data=work.portfolio_returns OUT=work.returns_sorted BY portfolio_return (ascending); DATA work.var_historical SET work.returns_sorted NOBS=n_obs; percentile_rank=_N_/n_obs; IF percentile_rank <= (1-confidence_level) THEN CALL SYMPUTX('var_estimate', portfolio_return), var_level=portfolio_return, OUTPUT; FORMAT percent10.4; %PUT Historical VaR; %END

%IF &method = PARAMETRIC inside risk_metrics: Method 2 — DATA work.var_parametric SET work.return_stats; z_score=PROBIT(confidence_level); var_parametric=mean_return - z_score*std_return (left-tail); var_annual=var_parametric*SQRT(annualization); pdf_z=PDF('NORMAL', z_score, 0, 1); cvar_parametric=mean_return - std_return*pdf_z/(1-confidence_level) for Expected Shortfall; CALL SYMPUTX for var_estimate and cvar_estimate; FORMAT percent10.4; %PUT Parametric VaR and CVaR; %END

%IF &method = MONTECARLO inside risk_metrics: Method 3 — %LET n_simulations=1000; DATA work.mc_simulations SET work.return_stats; CALL STREAMINIT(42); %DO i=1 %TO 1000 loop generating sim_return=mean_return + std_return*RAND('NORMAL'), OUTPUT; %END; KEEP sim_id sim_return; PROC SORT OUT=work.mc_sorted BY sim_return; DATA work.var_montecarlo SET work.mc_sorted NOBS=n_sims; percentile_rank identifies VaR cutoff via CALL SYMPUTX; %PUT Monte Carlo VaR; PROC MEANS data=work.mc_sorted NOPRINT WHERE sim_return <= var_estimate for CVaR; OUTPUT OUT=work.mc_cvar MEAN=cvar_mc; %END

DATA work.var_results inside risk_metrics: consolidation step; LENGTH method $12 portfolio_id $10; method=current method string; portfolio_id via SYMGET('current_portfolio'); confidence=confidence_level; var_estimate via INPUT(SYMGET); analysis_date=analysis_dt; FORMAT percent10.4 yymmdd10.; RUN; %LET risk_done=1; %PUT risk metrics complete; %MEND risk_metrics

%MACRO attribution_analysis(benchmark_id=) opening: documentation header for Brinson-Fachler performance attribution and style analysis; outputs work.attribution, work.attrib_summary, work.style_factors; %LOCAL n_sectors total_bench_return; %PUT banner with benchmark_id and method description

PROC SQL NOPRINT inside attribution_analysis: Step 1 — SELECT SUM(bench_weight * bench_return) FORMAT=percent10.6 INTO :total_bench_return TRIMMED FROM bench.sector_weights WHERE benchmark_id; computes total benchmark return for reference; QUIT

PROC SQL NOPRINT inside attribution_analysis: Step 2 — CREATE TABLE work.attrib_raw; SELECT sector, security_id, portfolio_weight as port_weight, daily_return as port_return, bench_weight, bench_return, active_weight, active_return; FROM work.positions p INNER JOIN work.security_returns r ON security_id INNER JOIN bench.sector_weights b ON sector AND benchmark_id; WHERE price_date=analysis_dt AND daily_return NOT NULL; ORDER BY sector; SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT sector) INTO :n_sectors TRIMMED; QUIT; %PUT sector count

DATA work.attribution inside attribution_analysis: Step 3 — Brinson-Fachler decomposition; SET work.attrib_raw; allocation_effect=(port_weight-bench_weight)*(bench_return-total_bench_return); selection_effect=bench_weight*(port_return-bench_return); interaction_effect=(port_weight-bench_weight)*(port_return-bench_return); total_effect=allocation+selection+interaction; FORMAT percent10.4; RUN

PROC MEANS inside attribution_analysis: Step 4 — DATA=work.attribution NOPRINT NWAY; CLASS sector; VAR allocation_effect selection_effect interaction_effect total_effect; OUTPUT OUT=work.attrib_summary(DROP=_TYPE_ _FREQ_) SUM(allocation_effect)=alloc_sum SUM(selection_effect)=select_sum SUM(interaction_effect)=interact_sum SUM(total_effect)=total_sum; RUN

DATA work.style_factors inside attribution_analysis: Step 5 — SET work.positions; ARRAY factors{3} factor_value factor_growth factor_size; ARRAY betas{3} beta_value beta_growth beta_size; ARRAY labels{3} $10 _TEMPORARY_ ('VALUE' 'GROWTH' 'SIZE'); value factor=1.0 if sector IN (FINANCIALS, ENERGY, UTILITIES); growth factor=1.0 if sector IN (TECHNOLOGY, HEALTHCARE, CONSUMER_DISC); size factor based on market_value thresholds (1M=1.0, 500K=0.5, else 0.0); DO j=1 TO 3 betas{j}=factors{j}*portfolio_weight; FORMAT 8.4; DROP j; RUN; %LET attrib_done=1; %PUT attribution complete; %MEND attribution_analysis

%MACRO generate_report opening: documentation header for compiling consolidated portfolio report from prior macro outputs; produces out.portfolio_report and ODS PDF; %LOCAL total_return sharpe_ratio alpha beta ann_return ann_vol; %PUT banner with current_portfolio

PROC SQL NOPRINT inside generate_report: Step 1 — executive summary metrics; SELECT MAX(cumulative_return) INTO :total_return from work.wealth_index; SELECT (mean_return*annualization - risk_free_rate)/(std_return*SQRT(annualization)) INTO :sharpe_ratio from work.return_stats for Sharpe ratio; SELECT mean_return*annualization, std_return*SQRT(annualization) INTO :ann_return, :ann_vol from work.return_stats for annualized return and volatility; QUIT; %PUT total_return and sharpe_ratio

PROC TABULATE inside generate_report: Step 2 — DATA=work.attribution OUT=work.sector_tab; CLASS sector; VAR port_weight bench_weight active_weight total_effect; TABLE sector='Sector' ALL='TOTAL', port_weight*SUM bench_weight*SUM active_weight*SUM total_effect*SUM with percent and percent10.4 formats; RUN
PROC SORT inside generate_report: Step 3 — DATA=work.security_returns OUT=work.contrib_sorted BY DESCENDING daily_return; WHERE price_date=analysis_dt; RUN

DATA work.top_bottom inside generate_report: SET work.contrib_sorted NOBS=n_total; IF _N_<=10 THEN rank_type='TOP', contrib_rank=_N_, OUTPUT for top 10 contributors; IF _N_ > n_total-10 THEN rank_type='BOTTOM', contrib_rank=n_total-_N_+1, OUTPUT for bottom 10; KEEP security_id daily_return rank_type contrib_rank; RUN

ODS PDF output inside generate_report: Step 4 — ODS PDF FILE= with style=journal; TITLE1 Investment Portfolio Analysis Report; TITLE2 with current_portfolio, analysis_date, analyst_name; FOOTNOTE1 with Sharpe, ann_return, ann_vol; FOOTNOTE2 with run_date, confidence_level; PROC REPORT data=work.attrib_summary NOWD with COLUMNS sector alloc_sum select_sum interact_sum total_sum; DEFINE group/sum with percent10.4 formats; RBREAK AFTER/SUMMARIZE with bold+lightyellow style; PROC PRINT data=work.top_bottom NOOBS LABEL with rank_type, contrib_rank, security_id, daily_return labels; TITLE/FOOTNOTE clear; ODS PDF CLOSE

DATA out.portfolio_report inside generate_report: Step 5 — LENGTH portfolio_id $10 analyst $30 report_status $15; portfolio_id via SYMGET('current_portfolio'); analysis_date, total_return, sharpe_ratio, ann_return, ann_vol via INPUT(SYMGET); analyst=analyst_name; report_date=DATETIME(); report_status='COMPLETE'; FORMAT yymmdd10. datetime20. percent10.4 8.4; RUN; %PUT report generated; %MEND generate_report
Section 3 header (Main Program Execution) and %PUT execution banner with PORTFOLIO ANALYSIS ENGINE v2.3 title, analysis_date, portfolio_list, benchmark_id, analyst_name, run_date

%MACRO run_all_portfolios opening: documentation header for iterating over portfolio list executing load-returns-risk-attribution-report pipeline with error handling and VaR consolidation; %LOCAL i current_portfolio

%DO i=1 %TO &n_portfolios loop inside run_all_portfolios: %LET current_portfolio=%SCAN(portfolio_list, i); %PUT processing banner; Step 1: %load_positions(portfolio_id=current_portfolio, as_of=analysis_date); Step 2: %calculate_returns(frequency=DAILY); Step 3: %risk_metrics(method=HISTORICAL), %risk_metrics(method=PARAMETRIC), %risk_metrics(method=MONTECARLO); Step 4: %attribution_analysis(benchmark_id=benchmark_id); Step 5: %generate_report; PROC APPEND BASE=out.var_consolidated DATA=work.var_results FORCE; %IF &syserr>0: %LET analysis_rc=1, %PUT ERROR for failed portfolio; %END loop; %MEND run_all_portfolios
Comment and %run_all_portfolios invocation to execute the multi-portfolio analysis pipeline

Section 4 header (Diagnostic Output and Cleanup); TITLE1/TITLE2 Consolidated VaR Summary — All Portfolios with analysis_date and confidence_level; PROC PRINT data=out.var_consolidated NOOBS LABEL; VAR portfolio_id method confidence var_estimate analysis_date; LABEL Portfolio, VaR Method, Confidence, VaR Estimate, Analysis Date; RUN; TITLE clear

TITLE1/TITLE2 Portfolio Return Statistics — Last Processed with frequency and lookback; PROC PRINT data=work.return_stats NOOBS; VAR n_obs mean_return std_return min_return max_return median_return q1_return q3_return; FORMAT percent10.4; RUN; TITLE clear
TITLE1 Wealth Index — Cumulative Performance; PROC PRINT data=work.wealth_index(OBS=5) NOOBS; VAR price_date portfolio_return cumulative_wealth peak_wealth current_drawdown; RUN; TITLE clear

Cleanup: PROC DATASETS LIB=work NOLIST NOWARN; DELETE positions_raw price_sorted returns_sorted mc_simulations mc_sorted mc_cvar contrib_sorted sector_tab attrib_raw var_historical var_parametric var_montecarlo temporary work datasets; QUIT
OPTIONS NOMPRINT NOMLOGIC NOSYMBOLGEN reset to defaults; final %PUT completion banner with PORTFOLIO ANALYSIS COMPLETE, n_portfolios, analysis_date, analysis_rc
